channel.title: People on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in People on CEDIS

item.title: People
item.description: Full Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: People
item.description: Active network and institutional memory of CEDIS — advisees, collaborators, alumni and external authors in the group's outputs.

item.title: People
item.description: Associate Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing with a focus on requirements, human aspects, and software engineering education.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: People
item.description: The project is to create the GCMP (Gamified Chatbot Development Process), a structured method for developing gamified chatbots.

item.title: People
item.description: Master in Applied Computing, University of Brasília

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program on software engineering, software metrics, testing, and software quality.

item.title: People
item.description: Works on the development of Evidentia Review, a CEDIS software platform for systematic literature reviews.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering at the University of Brasília; PIBIC undergraduate research advisee of Prof. Cristiane Ramos in the Canal Ciência Project.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering at the University of Brasília; PIBIC undergraduate research advisee of Prof. Sergio Freitas in the Canal Ciência Project.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering at the University of Brasília; PIBIC undergraduate research advisee of Prof. Cristiane Ramos in the Canal Ciência Project.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering, University of Brasília

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering at the University of Brasília; PIBIC advisee of Prof. Sergio Freitas in the Canal Ciência Project.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Computing, Federal Institute of Education, Science, and Technology of Southern Minas Gerais

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Computer Science, Federal Institute of Education, Science, and Technology of Ceará

item.title: People
item.description: Associate Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program.

item.title: People
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program on software quality, digital government, and software engineering education.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program with a focus on parallel computing, high-performance computing, GPU, cloud computing, and bioinformatics.

item.title: People
item.description: Co-author cited in 1 publication by CEDIS.
